sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Balance & Landing Physics
special_mechanics.description: Landing squarely on both wheels maintains momentum; uneven landing results in speed loss or crash. Player shifts racer's balance mid-air after jumps using directional pad.

special_mechanics.name: Turbo Boost
special_mechanics.description: B button activates turbo boost that enhances bike speed but overheats engine if used too long, forcing immobile cooldown period. Temperature reset by driving over arrows on course.

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative). Sources contain gameplay mechanics documentation but no precise numerical physics parameters. Core movement feels derived from smooth side-scrolling engine later used in Super Mario Bros., featuring smooth acceleration from stationary to max speed rather than constant velocity.
sources_used: wikipedia - Gameplay section describing jump, landing, balance, and turbo mechanics
